phrases.en: I put a bottom sheet on the mattress.
phrases.zh: 我把一张床单铺在床垫上。

phrases.en: If I have a fitted sheet, I slip it over the mattress.
phrases.zh: 如果是床笠，我就把它套在床垫上。

phrases.en: If I have a flat sheet, I tuck it under the mattress.
phrases.zh: 如果是平板床单，我就把它掖到床垫下面。

phrases.en: Then, I tuck the top sheet under the mattress at the foot of the bed.
phrases.zh: 然后，我把盖被单掖到床尾的床垫下面。

phrases.en: I pull the top sheet tight.
And spread a blanket over the bed.
phrases.zh: 再把一条毯子铺在床上。

phrases.en: I spread a bedspread over the bed.
phrases.zh: 我把一条床罩铺在床上。

phrases.en: And lay them at the head of the bed.
I pull the bedspread over the pillows.
